name: Bassins des Lumieres
summary: A dramatic immersive digital-art venue inside Bordeaux's former submarine base.
whyItMatters: It is a strong contrast to wine museums and old-town architecture, and the official 2026 program includes Matisse, Frida Kahlo, The Little Prince, and Ocean programming.
pros: Unusual setting in the former submarine base
Official 2026 programming aligns with the trip dates
Good indoor evening or hot-afternoon option
cons: North of the historic center, so transit planning matters
Digital immersive format may not appeal to everyone

logistics.opening_hours: Official site publishes opening times/rates; verify exact July 2026 hours.
logistics.distance_from_base: Bordeaux lodging dependent; north of central Bordeaux.
logistics.distance_from_viewing_point: Away from the Stage 7 finish area; plan separate transit.
logistics.transit: Use Bordeaux transit/taxi; verify race-day disruptions.
logistics.parking: Unknown; official site and local parking should be checked.
logistics.road_closure_notes: Stage 7 finish-day transit disruptions are possible in Bordeaux.

nearbyFoodDrinkPairing: Pair with a Chartrons stop or riverside dinner rather than returning across the entire city twice.
